Credit Grade

GATEWAY REQUIREMENT MATH120/140/136, BMGT230, and BMGT220 must be completed Humanities (DSHU)* Lower Level Elective with a C- or higher by 45 credits (AP/IB and dual enrollment credits Lower Level Elective excluded).
